zh.Studley, Warwickshire, England: 英國瓦維其可爾斯圖德利

zh.Studley, Alcester, Warwickshire, England: 英國瓦維其可爾斯圖德利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sybil Corbison於1276年出生在英國瓦維其可爾斯圖德利時，她的父親Peter Corbicon of Studley33歲，母親Sirke Studley28歲。她與John Durvassal在英國格盧斯特斯爾素德勒結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1363年之後在英國瓦維其可爾斯白納爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sybil Corbison于1276年出生在英国瓦維其可爾斯圖德利时，她的父亲Peter Corbicon of Studley33岁，母亲Sirke Studley28岁。她与John Durvassal在英国格盧斯特斯爾素德勒结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1363年之后在英国瓦維其可爾斯白納爾。

nameMeanings.name: Corbison
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Sybil
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Sybilla

It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sybil Corbison was born in 1276, in Studley, Warwickshire, England, her father, Peter Corbicon of Studley, was 33 and her mother, Sirke Studley, was 28. She married John Durvassal in Sudeley, Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died after 1363, in Spernall, Warwickshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sybil Corbison est née en 1276, à Studley, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Peter Corbicon of Studley, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Sirke Studley, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé John Durvassal à Sudeley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée après 1363, à Spernall, Warwickshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sybil Corbison 1276 in Studley, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Peter Corbicon of Studley 33 und ihre Mutter Sirke Studley 28. Sie hat in Sudeley, Gloucestershire, England John Durvassal geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb nach 1363 in Spernall, Warwickshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sybil Corbison è nata il nel 1276 nel Studley, Warwickshire, England, sua padre, Peter Corbicon of Studley, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Sirke Studley, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato John Durvassal nel Sudeley, Gloucestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì dopo il 1363, nel Spernall, Warwickshire, England.

ja.Studley, Alcester, Warwickshire, England: イギリスワーウィクシュアイアストゥドリー
ja.lifeSummary: Sybil Corbisonが1276年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアストゥドリーで生まれた時，父Peter Corbicon of Studleyは33歳，母Sirke Studleyは28歳であった。イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアスデリーでJohn Durvassalと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1363年以後にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアスペルナルで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sybil Corbison(이)가 1276년 영국 워윅실르 스투들리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Peter Corbicon of Studley(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sirke Studley(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 영국 그루스스터실르 수데리에서 John Durvassal(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1363년 이후 영국 워윅실르 스퍼널에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sybil Corbison nasceu em 1276, em Studley, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Peter Corbicon of Studley, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Sirke Studley, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com John Durvassal em Sudeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu após 1363, em Spernall, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sybil Corbison родилась в 1276 г. в местности студли, варвиккшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Peter Corbicon of Studley было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Sirke Studley, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Durvassal в местности судели, глоусестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла после 1363 г. в местности спирналл, варвиккшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sybil Corbison nació en 1276, en Studley, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Peter Corbicon of Studley, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Sirke Studley, tenía 28 años. Se casó con John Durvassal en Sudeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió después de 1363, en Spernall, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.
